headerDisplay:
חשוב מאוד לקרוא את תנאי השימוש!

התוסף איננו תוסף רשמי של פיקוד העורף או מערכת הבטחון.

התוסף משתמש ב-API של פיקוד העורף לקבלת התרעות ולכן יתכנו שיבושים.

בכל מקרה יש להמשיך להשתמש באמצעיים הרשמיים של מערכת הבטחון.

Disclaimer:

1. This plugin is not an official Home Front Command product.

2. The plugin uses the Pikud HaOref public API for alerts. There may be delays or disruptions.

3. Always use the official alert systems alongside this plugin.

cities.title: Cities (separate by comma, written in Hebrew)
cities.description: City names must match Pikud HaOref naming exactly (in Hebrew). With prefix matching enabled, 'תל אביב' will match all Tel Aviv sub-areas. Used when no sensors are configured.

categories.title: Alert Categories
categories.description: Select which alert types to be notified about. If none selected, all categories are enabled. Used when no sensors are configured.

prefix_matching.title: Enable Prefix Matching
prefix_matching.description: When enabled, 'תל אביב' will match all sub-areas like 'תל אביב - דרום העיר ויפו'. Used when no sensors are configured.

sensors.title: Sensors
sensors.description: Configure multiple sensors, each with different cities, categories, and settings. When sensors are configured, the top-level cities/categories/prefix_matching fields are ignored.

name.title: Sensor Name
name.description: A unique name for this sensor (appears in HomeKit).

cities.title: Cities (separate by comma, written in Hebrew)
cities.description: City names must match Pikud HaOref naming exactly (in Hebrew).

categories.title: Alert Categories
categories.description: Select which alert types to monitor. If none selected, all categories are enabled.

prefix_matching.title: Enable Prefix Matching
prefix_matching.description: When enabled, city names match by prefix.

alert_timeout.title: Alert Timeout (ms)
alert_timeout.description: Safety fallback: if 'Event Ended' is never received, the alert will auto-clear after this time. Resets when a new alert arrives. Default is 30 minutes.

polling_interval.title: Polling Interval (ms)
polling_interval.description: How often to check for new alerts. Lower values are faster but use more bandwidth.

request_timeout.title: Request Timeout (ms)
request_timeout.description: How long to wait for the OREF API to respond before aborting the request. Increase if you have a slow network.

debug.title: Enable Debug Logs
debug.description: When checked, the plugin will produce extra logs for debugging purposes.

layout.title: Sensors
layout.description: Add multiple sensors with different cities and alert types. When sensors are added, the top-level cities/categories fields are hidden.
